description:
Parent epic: V3 E11: Schedules

Source task 2/6 from MILESTONE_V3.md:

- Decide whether schedule definitions live inside `agent :id do ... end` in V3.

Epic closure criteria:
- schedules are clearly first-class Jidoka features
- tests cover agent targets, session targets, and workflow targets

comments.text: Decision implemented: V3 schedules live inside agent :id do ... end. Removed top-level schedules section from the Spark extension, added top-level schedules rejection, updated fixtures/docs/tests, and kept tools/capabilities outside. Full gate passed.

title: E11: Decide whether schedule definitions live inside agent :id do ... end in V3
